description_long: This object consists of four distinct trees arranged in a row on a rectangular patch of grassy terrain. Each tree displays a unique canopy shape and foliage density, ranging from conical to rounded and irregular forms. The trunks are slender and straight, with varying bark textures and colors, and the canopies exhibit a mix of dark green and brownish-green hues. The ground beneath the trees is covered in a patchy, natural-looking grass with some bare earth visible. The trees appear to be of different species, contributing to a diverse urban greenery aesthetic. No visible roots extend above the ground, and the trees are spaced evenly apart, suggesting intentional landscaping.
description: A group of four visually distinct trees on a grassy rectangular plot, each with unique canopy shapes and foliage colors. The arrangement and diversity evoke a landscaped urban park or roadside planting.
description_view_0: Four trees are seen side by side, clearly showing their different canopy shapes and foliage densities.
description_view_1: The trees are viewed from the side, appearing almost in a line, with their canopies overlapping and only the trunks of the nearest and farthest trees clearly visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the group is visible, again showing all four trees with their unique canopies and spacing.
description_view_3: Viewed from the other side, the trees are aligned in a row, with their trunks and canopies forming a dense visual barrier.
